description: A Node.js web application at /home/ga/todo-app/ currently uses a single-stage Dockerfile that produces a bloated image. Rewrite the Dockerfile using a multi-stage build with at least two stages to significantly reduce the image size. The resulting image must be tagged 'todo-app:optimized' and maintain full application functionality on port 3000. The original image 'todo-app:original' is available as a reference.
